description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Style Checks that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have read permission to repository contents and a single job named lint that runs on ubuntu-latest with Node.js 22.x. The job should harden the runner, check out the repository with full history, list all Git branches, set up the specified Node.js version, install dependencies with npm install, and run the lint command with a specific format start reference.
